overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Mafia III showing a character in a beige suit walking through a rainy 1960s New Orleans-inspired urban residential area. The character navigates wet streets lined with vintage vehicles, power lines, and historic architecture including a prominent two-story house with an ornate iron balcony.

scene_state.functional_zone: street corner with stop sign and parked vintage cars

events.description: character begins walking forward from a stationary position at the street corner
white vintage car drives past on the wet road

agents.ego_description: walking along the wet sidewalk away from the street corner, passing a stop sign

entered.detail: red octagonal stop sign at the street corner
white 1950s-era sedan parked near the corner
white striped pedestrian crossing lines on the wet asphalt
rain-slicked concrete pavement reflecting the overcast sky
circular metal manhole cover on the sidewalk edge

segments.scene_description: The character starts at a rainy street corner marked by a stop sign and parked vintage cars. Walking along the wet concrete sidewalk, a white vintage car passes by on the road as the character moves away from the intersection, with manhole covers and crosswalk markings visible on the ground.

scene_state.functional_zone: roadside verge with power lines and industrial backdrop

events.description: transitions from concrete sidewalk to dirt roadside verge
multiple yellow vintage cars driving along the wet road

agents.ego_description: walking along the dirt roadside verge parallel to moving traffic, with power lines overhead

entered.detail: overhead electrical wires spanning across the road
tall metal electrical transmission tower in the distance
low industrial structures and warehouses visible through the haze
1950s-era yellow sedans driving on the road
unpaved dirt and grass verge alongside the asphalt road

segments.scene_description: Walking along the roadside dirt path, the character moves beneath overhead power lines with industrial buildings visible in the hazy distance. Several yellow vintage cars drive past on the wet asphalt road as the environment opens up to a more industrial zone.

scene_state.functional_zone: residential street with historic New Orleans-style houses

events.description: entering residential area with historic architecture and wooden fences
pedestrian with umbrella passes close to the camera on the right

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk past a large two-story house with an ornate iron balcony and wooden fence

notable_agents.action: woman holding a dark umbrella walking past the character on the sidewalk

entered.detail: large weathered house with ornate iron balcony and ivy-covered walls
tall wooden privacy fence running along the property line
white postal mailbox on a post near the fence
covered entrance with decorative white columns and iron railings
wooden telephone pole with transformer and wires

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to a residential area featuring a prominent two-story historic house with an ornate iron balcony and wooden fence. A pedestrian with an umbrella passes by on the wet sidewalk as the character continues walking past the house porch and mailbox.

scene_state.functional_zone: approaching urban intersection with commercial buildings

events.description: approaching crosswalk with visible traffic and pedestrians
reaching the intersection with commercial buildings and crossing pedestrians visible

agents.ego_description: continuing along the sidewalk toward a busy intersection, passing wire mesh bins and a fire hydrant

notable_agents.action: pedestrian crossing the street at the crosswalk ahead

entered.detail: two-story blue wooden house with white trim
metal wire mesh trash cages on the sidewalk
red and black fire hydrant on the sidewalk edge
mint green 1950s-era sedan parked along the curb
storefront buildings visible at the intersection ahead
white striped pedestrian crossing at the intersection

segments.scene_description: Walking past a blue house and wire mesh trash bins, the character approaches an intersection with a fire hydrant and crosswalk visible. The environment becomes more urban with commercial buildings and additional pedestrians crossing the street as the character nears the intersection.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rainy urban landscape that shifts from a quiet street corner into an industrial zone before settling into a historic residential neighborhood. It begins at a wet intersection marked by a stop sign and parked vintage cars, moving along a concrete sidewalk as a white vehicle passes by. As the character transitions to a roadside dirt path, the environment opens up into a hazy industrial area where yellow vintage cars drive beneath a network of overhead power lines. The scene then shifts toward a residential district, passing a prominent two-story historic house with an ornate iron balcony and a pedestrian carrying an umbrella. Finally, the camera moves past a blue house and wire mesh bins, approaching a busy urban intersection filled with commercial buildings and crossing pedestrians.
